name: Annual 1099
description: Accounting prepares year-end owner and vendor 1099 review packets, TIN gaps, filing drafts, and correction tracking with human approval before any tax filing, recipient notice, payment classification, money, or system action.

stages.name: Normalize Tax Year Inputs
stages.description: Normalize owner, vendor, TIN, threshold, and payment facts for the reporting year.

steps.title: Normalize 1099 inputs
steps.instructions: Normalize tax year, owners, vendors, paid amounts, reportable-category candidates, TIN/W-9 state, entity names, addresses, exemption flags, prior corrections, filing vendor state, and missing facts. Unknown reportability, TIN validity, exemption status, or tax conclusions must remain null with needs_verification.
steps.dispatch_body: Normalize 1099 candidate inputs and missing-data flags. No filings, recipient notices, tax conclusions, money action, or system writes.

steps.title: Check duplicates and ownership
steps.instructions: Check whether accounting staff, CPA, filing provider, or another workflow already owns each recipient; identify duplicate recipients, missing W-9s, prior year corrections, and unresolved disputes. Do not contact recipients or update tax data.
steps.dispatch_body: Check duplicate, W-9, CPA, and filing-provider state. No external sends, filings, or system writes.

stages.name: Draft 1099 QA Packet
stages.description: Prepare tax QA and missing-data packets without filing or contacting recipients.

steps.title: Draft 1099 QA packet
steps.instructions: Draft QA packet with recipient candidates, reportable amount caveats, missing TIN/W-9 list, address gaps, exemption needs_verification, owner/vendor split, filing timeline, correction risk, and CPA-review flags. Draft-only; do not file, classify as final, send notices, or write systems.
steps.dispatch_body: Draft 1099 QA and missing-data packet only. No filings, recipient sends, tax conclusions, money action, or system writes.

steps.title: Review 1099 QA packet
steps.instructions: Review reportability, recipient list, amounts, W-9/TIN gaps, CPA involvement, filing timeline, and correction risk before any recipient request, filing packet, or system update is approved.
steps.human_prompt: Review annual 1099 QA packet before recipient, filing, tax, money, or system action.

stages.name: Approve And Stage Filing
stages.description: Human approval gates recipient requests, filing, corrections, and accounting updates.

steps.title: Approve 1099 action
steps.instructions: Approve, edit, reject, or route to CPA before any recipient W-9 request, owner/vendor notice, filing submission, correction, reportability decision, amount finalization, accounting update, money action, or AppFolio write.
steps.human_prompt: Approval required before 1099 recipient, filing, correction, tax, money, accounting, or system action.

steps.title: Stage approved 1099 package
steps.instructions: Stage approved 1099 filing packet, recipient-request drafts, correction notes, CPA handoff, approval source, unresolved needs_verification fields, and next owner for human release. Do not file, send, correct, post, pay, or write systems.
steps.dispatch_body: Stage approved 1099 package for human release. No filings, recipient sends, tax actions, money actions, or system writes.
